## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please verify:

- [ ] **Tests added** — All new functionality has corresponding tests
- [ ] **Suite is green** — `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] **Code is formatted** — `ruff format` and `ruff check` pass
- [ ] **Types are correct** — `mypy sentigent/` produces no errors
- [ ] **README is accurate** — Claims in README.md still reflect the code
- [ ] **No secrets committed** — No API keys, tokens, or private paths in this diff
- [ ] **Dashboard built** (if changed frontend) — `npm run build` completed and `static/` committed
- [ ] **Documentation updated** — Architecture docs or CONTRIBUTING updated if needed
